rootCause.title: YYYYMMDD vs ISO string comparison in Prisma PIT gate
rootCause.buggyQuery: date: { lte: asOfDb }  // asOfDb = '20260520', stored date = '2026-05-20'
rootCause.mechanism: SQLite text comparison: '2026-05-21' <= '20260520' → TRUE because ASCII '-' (45) < '0' (48). All same-year future ISO records incorrectly pass the PIT gate.
rootCause.proof: T12 in p29f_repair_quote_chip_pit_date.test.ts: '2026-05-21' <= '20260520' evaluates to true in JS string comparison, confirming the semantic error.
rootCause.whyRegimeUnaffected: MarketRegimeEngine.ts uses date: { lte: asOf } directly with ISO asOf — no YYYYMMDD conversion applied

storageConfirmation.InstitutionalChip.date: ISO (YYYY-MM-DD) via const isoDate = ... in syncService.ts:L395
storageConfirmation.dbSample: Latest StockQuote date observed: 2026-05-18; Latest InstitutionalChip date: 2026-05-05

fix.strategy: Strategy A — remove YYYYMMDD conversion; normalize to ISO
fix.helperBehavior: ISO input → passthrough; YYYYMMDD input → convert to ISO; invalid → throw
fix.queryFix: date: { lte: asOfIso }  // asOfIso = '2026-05-20' (ISO), stored date = '2026-05-20' → correct
fix.revenueQueryFix: asOfMonth derived from asOfIso.slice(5, 7) instead of asOfDb.slice(4, 6) — both yield same result for ISO input
fix.schemaCommentFix: prisma/schema.prisma: InstitutionalChip.date comment updated from '// YYYYMMDD' to '// ISO (YYYY-MM-DD)'

falsePositiveRiskEliminated.oldBehavior: asOf='2026-05-20', future record date='2026-05-21': '2026-05-21' <= '20260520' = TRUE → future record incorrectly included
falsePositiveRiskEliminated.newBehavior: asOf='2026-05-20', future record date='2026-05-21': '2026-05-21' <= '2026-05-20' = FALSE → future record correctly excluded
